posts.author: daito (AYA)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
I would like to create the following specifications,
but is there a way to count common values?

① Decide the month number (2024-09)
② Convert ① to 24H-xx
③ Count how many of the same format as ② are on the entire board and express the number +1 in three digits
2024-09001
2024-09002
2024-09003
